name: Digital-to-Branch Switchers
description: Members who started a journey digitally but switched to branch mid-process

name: Journey Abandoners — Document Upload
description: Members who abandoned their application at the document upload step
defining_rules: Did not complete upload within 72 hours

name: IVR Escalation Queue Members
description: Members who escalated from IVR self-service to live agent
defining_rules: Pressed 0 or requested agent within 90 seconds
